room.caption: [G3-4F] Try doing this from the left without getting hit... also no dashing.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(15)
mHeadSpawner=instance_create(0,0,oMedusaHeadSpawner) mHeadSpawner.reSpawnSpeed=120
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh6MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(304) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
